page_content:
Total Credits

8-10

2 Required for all ACES Minor students

Advanced Cybersecurity Experience for Students Minor

3 Select at least 3 courses. Students may also substitute one or two electives from courses including CCJS418B, CMSC414, CMSC456, CMSC498R, ENEE459C, ENEE459D, ENEE459E, and ENME442.

Notes:

• At the time of application students must have 30 university credits completed (including transfer credit), a minimum cumulative GPA of a 3.0, and at least 3 semesters remaining prior to graduation

• Upon admission to the minor students will become part of the Honors College and are subject to its policies

• Students must maintain a 3.0 cumulative GPA to remain in good standing in the minor per Honors College requirements

• All courses used to satisfy the requirements of the minor must be completed with a grade of “C-” or better

• A maximum of 2 courses may be used to satisfy the requirements of both a major and a minor

1
